# dockercompose_project (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Project name for the Docker Compose stack.

### Optional

- `compose_file` (String) Path to an existing docker-compose.yml file.
- `compose_yaml` (String) Inline docker-compose YAML content. Supports templatefile().
- `remove_volumes_on_destroy` (Boolean) Whether to remove volumes on destroy.

### Read-Only

- `container` (List of Object) Runtime information about containers in the stack (populated after apply). Sorted by service name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--container))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `yaml_sha256` (String) SHA256 hash of the compose YAML for change detection.

<a id="nestedatt--container"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container`

Read-Only:

- `container_id` (String)
- `container_name` (String)
- `exit_code` (Number)
- `health` (String)
- `image` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `network_settings` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--container--network_settings))
- `ports` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--container--ports))
- `service` (String)
- `state` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--container--network_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container.network_settings`

Read-Only:

- `gateway` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `mac_address` (String)
- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--container--ports"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container.ports`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String)
- `private_port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `public_port` (Number)
